##NAMES=Epiebnerite
##RRUFFID=R250056
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(NH_4_)Zn(PO_4_)
##LOCALITY=Rowley mine, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Colourless prisms or blades that occur in bat-guano-related, post-mining assemblage of  phases. and grow epitactically on ebnerite and replaces it. This is the type sample, described in Kampf et al (2024)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250056
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=[(NH_4_)_0.67_K_0.28_](Zn_0.99_Cu_0.02_)(P_1.00_O_4_)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.796 b: 5.457 c: 8.96 alpha: 90 beta: 90.34 gamma: 90 volume: 430.1 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
